mapper.select: SELECT DEPTNO AS "deptno", ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS "orgNameLocal" FROM HR_DEPARTMENT WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY DEPTNO ASC
SELECT PERSON_ID FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV ( PK_NO, PERSON_ID, SHIFT_NO, AR_DATE_STR, LOCK_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ADD_FLAG, CREATED_IP, TYPEID, REMARK ) VALUES ( AR_SCHEDULE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 'N', #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB_EXCEL_TEMP ( DEPTNO, EMPID, APPLY_NAME, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, LEAVE_FROM_DATE, LEAVE_FROM_TIME, LEAVE_TO_DATE, LEAVE_TO_TIME, APPLY_LENGTH, LEAVE_REASON, AFFIRM_FLAG, UPLOAD_BY, UPLOAD_DATE, CPNY_ID, LINE_ID, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, RESULT_FLAG ) VALUES ( ( SELECT HE.DEPTNO FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HE WHERE HE.EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HE.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ), #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveFromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveToDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyLength, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploadErrorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{resultFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') )

INSERT INTO ESS_OT_APPLY_TB_EXCEL_TEMP ( DEPTNO, EMPID, APPLY_NAME, APPLY_OT_DATE, OT_FROM_DATE, OT_FROM_TIME, OT_TO_DATE, OT_TO_TIME, OT_APPLY_HOUR, APPLY_OT_REMARK, AFFIRM_FLAG, UPLOAD_BY, UPLOAD_DATE, CPNY_ID, LINE_ID, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, RESULT_FLAG, OT_TYPE_CODE, ADJUST_YN, SPECIAL_YN, OFFSET_YN, DEDUCT_YN ) VALUES ( ( SELECT HE.DEPTNO FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HE WHERE HE.EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HE.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ), #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otFromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otToDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otApplyHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploadErrorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{resultFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{otTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{adjustYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), NVL(#{specialYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), NVL(#{offsetYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), NVL(#{deductYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0') )
